case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MAYSA COSTA DOS SANTOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $660.11 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COSTA DOS SANTOS, MAYSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2018 BY LESLIE C. NICHOLS. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED JUN-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COSTA DOS SANTOS, MAYSA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSTA DOS SANTOS, MAYSA $661.11 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $746.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
